description: Rules correlating relief activity with check-in mood data

rules.title: Relief is working
rules.message: Your relief methods are effective and mood is trending up. Keep doing what works.

rules.title: Low relief, low mood
rules.message: You've barely logged any relief this week and mood is low. Try one of your go-to methods.

rules.title: Relief without focus
rules.message: You're doing relief activities but not fully engaged. Quality over quantity — try being more present.

rules.title: Effort without lift
rules.message: You're putting in the effort but mood isn't lifting. It might be time to try something different.

rules.title: Strong relief-to-stress ratio
rules.message: Great ratio of relief to stress this week. Keep it up.
